name: Smothered Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, toss the chicken with Essence and flour.
2. Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
3. When the oil is hot, brown the chicken for about 6-8 minutes on each side.
4. Add the onions to the pan and season with salt and pepper. Stir constantly until wilted and browned, scraping the bottom of the pot to loosen any brown particles, about 10 minutes.
5. Add bell peppers, mushrooms, corn, and bay leaf. Continue stirring, again scraping the bottom of the pot to loosen and brown particles, for another 15 minutes.
6. Pour in white wine, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until chicken is tender, about 45 minutes.
7. Stir in parsley and season with cayenne. Serve the chicken on a platter garnished with green onions.
